title: To designate a peak in the State of Nevada as Maude Frazier Mountain, and for other purposes.
plain_summary: This bill changes the name of a mountain peak in Nevada. The mountain is currently called Frenchman Mountain, but it will now be called Maude Frazier Mountain instead. All government papers and maps must use the new name from now on. The mountain is being renamed to honor someone named Maude Frazier.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
subjects: Wilderness and natural areas, wildlife refuges, wild rivers, habitats

sections.title: Section 1 Designation of Maude Frazier Mountain in the State of Nevada
sections.text: The mountain peak called Frenchman Mountain will now be officially called Maude Frazier Mountain. This mountain is located in Nevada at the exact spot marked by latitude thirty-six degrees ten minutes forty-five seconds North and longitude one hundred fourteen degrees fifty-nine minutes fifty-two seconds West. From now on, whenever any United States law, map, rule, document, record, or other official paper mentions this mountain peak, it must use the new name Maude Frazier Mountain instead of the old name.
